overview: DR. VIGOR offers advanced medical services including testosterone replacement therapy, erectile dysfunction treatments, fertility support, and male wellness programs. Care is delivered through a membership model with personalized treatment plans and concierge clinical oversight.
highlights: Calibrated TRT with proactive bloodwork and symptom-based adjustments
Multiple erectile dysfunction treatments (Vigor Shot, Firm Wave Therapy, Sexosomes)
VIP membership with priority access to services and exclusive treatments
targetAudience: Men seeking to enhance testosterone levels, sexual performance, fertility, and overall vitality.
